text.message: Need all the settle spots I can get. I'm hanging on by a thread here
you have better ore than me
I have no sheep and barely any wheat
No brick either for that matter
Just doing what I can to stay in it ma
best ore best wood best sheep ...
Blocked and robbed him every chance I got
no you rob me at the beginning
Oh the very beginning? Lol you hear yourself
and let black have all the space
What spot should I have taken?
